calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Continued To Jul-01-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Virginia Palmer for and with Joshua Margulies (Petitioner). Avid Alavi for and with Scott Hodges. Margaret Pendergrast for Joanne Sieple.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration appointing Scott Hodges as Administrator of the Estate of Frank Sieple (subject to review of the order) and overruled the objections filed by Joanne Sieple. Bond in the amount of $3,622,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Continued To Apr-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
